title: Delete Shared Setting
content:
# Delete Shared Setting

Permanently delete an existing Shared Setting. This cannot be undone once the API request has been submitted.

## Endpoint

`POST /users/shared/settings/{setting_name}/delete`

code_examples.code:
from kelvin.api import Client

client = Client(api_key="your-api-key")
response = client.user.deleteSharedSettings()
print(response)

parameters.name: setting_name
parameters.description: The Shared Setting key `setting_name` to delete. The string can only contain lowercase alphanumeric characters and `.`, `_` or `-` characters.
